G

getActiveThresholdDiscount() - Method in class Business.Cart
Gets the list of active threshold discounts for shops in the cart.

Gets the list of shops where the threshold discount is activated.

Calculates and retrieves the average review rating for a specific product.

Retrieves the brand of the product.

Retrieves the brand associated with a specific product.
getCartProductBrand(int) - Method in class Business.Cart
Gets the brand of the first product in the specified shop in the cart.

Gets the brand of the product at the specified index in the shopping cart.

Gets the discounted price of a product in the cart at a specific index.

Gets the name of the first product in the specified shop in the cart.

Gets the name of the product at the specified index in the shopping cart.
getCartProductPrice(int) - Method in class Business.Cart
Gets the price of the first product in the specified shop in the cart.
getCartProductPrice(int) - Method in class Business.CartManager
Gets the price of the product at the specified index in the shopping cart.

Gets the total number of shops in the cart.
getCartSize() - Method in class Business.CartManager
Gets the total number of products in the shopping cart.

Gets the catalog of the shop, which contains a list of products.

Gets the names of all products in the shop's catalog.

Retrieves the category of the product.

Retrieves the type of the current data access object (DAO) used for product management.

Gets the current type of the shop DAO.

Gets the current threshold prices for shops in the cart.
